mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, name, category, address, latitude, longitude, created_at FROM member_place WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_place (member_id, name, category, address, latitude, longitude) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{name}, #{category}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM member_place WHERE id = #{id} AND member_id = #{memberId}
